heading: This Afternoon
text: Mostly sunny. Highs in the mid to upper 70s in the south and in the Champlain Valley, low to mid 70s elsewhere north. South to southwest winds 5 to 10 mph, gusting to 15 mph.

heading: Tonight
text: Mostly clear, then some clouds arriving late. Lows from the upper 40s to mid 50s, mid to upper 50s in the broad valleys west. Winds becoming light, variable to south, except from the south at 5 to 10 mph in the Champlain and St. Lawrence valleys.

heading: Wednesday
text: Mostly to partly sunny. Showers and thunderstorms likely in far northern New York, chance elsewhere, mainly in the afternoon, except slight chance southeast. Highs from the mid 70s to around 80. South winds 5 to 15 mph, gusting to 25 mph in the Champlain and St. Lawrence valleys.
